mapper.select: SELECT d.dept_name AS ministryName, COUNT(DISTINCT m.member_id) AS memberCount, COUNT(DISTINCT s.schedule_id) AS activityCount, COUNT(DISTINCT v.volunteer_id) AS volunteerCount FROM erp_ministry_dept d LEFT JOIN erp_ministry_member m ON d.dept_id = m.dept_id LEFT JOIN erp_ministry_schedule s ON d.dept_id = s.dept_id AND (#{year} IS NULL OR #{year} = '' OR TO_CHAR(s.schedule_date, 'YYYY') = #{year}) LEFT JOIN erp_ministry_volunteer v ON d.dept_id = v.dept_id AND (#{year} IS NULL OR #{year} = '' OR TO_CHAR(v.assigned_at, 'YYYY') = #{year}) GROUP BY d.dept_id, d.dept_name ORDER BY d.dept_name
